name: Piki Wraps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine chopped tomatoes, chipotle chiles (minced), red onion, apple cider vinegar, parsley, cilantro, and cumin seeds.
2. In another bowl, mix cooked black beans, wild rice, and salt until well combined.
3. Stir all but half of the tomato mixture into the bean and rice mixture.
4. Place a tortilla on your serving plate.
5. Spoon the bean, vegetable, and rice filling into each tortilla, leaving about 1/2 cup of the tomato mixture for topping.
6. Fold the tortillas to enclose the filling.
7. Serve warm.
Blue cornmeal tortillas closely resemble piki bread, but yellow corn tortillas may be substituted here. Blue corn tortillas are available in many Latino and gourmet food shops across the country.
